title: Title Screen Mobs
body:
# Title Screen Mobs

This is the high version port of [Mobs Main Menu](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mobs-main-menu)

This mod add mobs render in title screen.

![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/IAFEnvoy/TitleScreenMobs/refs/heads/main/img/1.webp)

## Configuration

Config file will automatically generate at first launch. You can configure in-game with modmenu.

**Tip: If conflict with other mod, there will be an in-game toast. You can disable this feature in config.**
